children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: There is hereby imposed a tax on any port use.

children.heading: Amount of tax
children.label: b Amount of tax
children.text: The amount of the tax imposed by subsection (a) on any port use shall be an amount equal to 0.125 percent of the value of the commercial cargo involved.

children.heading: Liability and time of imposition of tax
children.label: c Liability and time of imposition of tax
A
children.text: in the case of cargo entering the United States, the importer, or

children.label: B
children.text: in any other case, the shipper.

children.heading: Time of imposition
children.label: 2 Time of imposition
children.text: Except as provided by regulations, the tax imposed by subsection (a) shall be imposed at the time of unloading.
